notes: Composition-pinning contract that grounds the ONE concrete WIN-BA-002 claim chapter 12.1 makes -- 'Tree views elsewhere in Base (relation and query designers) use the net-less Material tree: listnode disclosure at size-tree-node and the empty listnet/Entire state that suppresses connector nets -- implemented in definition.xml' -- against the real native wiring. The Add Table/Query dialog's `tablelist` GtkTreeView (hierarchical liststore2 GtkTreeStore, no show-expanders override) is welded in adtabdlg.cxx into OTableTreeListBox (a plain TreeListBox wrapping a stock weld::TreeView, no custom cell renderer), constructed from the single shared OJoinController::runDialogAsync path that both OQueryController and ORelationController derive -- so the pin genuinely covers 'relation and query designers' (plural). The generic listnode/listnet parts it resolves through already exist in definition.xml (read-only ground truth). Source-declared/static only: regex + XML assertions over comment-stripped C++/XML; no dbu build, no rendered tree, no live expanders, no runtime interaction is claimed (runtime_verified:false throughout).

listnet.note: 12.1: the empty listnet/Entire enabled state suppresses connector nets.

tree_view.note: The hierarchical tree binds the GtkTreeStore model and does NOT disable expanders at the .ui level, so disclosure stays governed by the native listnode part (contrast: the flat querylist binds liststore1/GtkListStore with show-expanders=False).

contrast_view.note: The flat query list is deliberately NOT the hierarchical net-less tree; pinned so the two are never conflated.

markers.role: OAddTableDlg binds tablesjoindialog.ui/TablesJoinDialog and wraps weld_tree_view(tablelist) into OTableTreeListBox with toggles disabled
OTableTreeListBox is a plain TreeListBox subclass (no custom tree)
TreeListBox wraps a stock weld::TreeView; no custom cell-renderer/paint override
markers.forbidden_note: no owner-draw/custom-render override may fight the native listnode part

markers.role: the Add Table/Query dialog is constructed from the single shared OJoinController path
OQueryController derives OJoinController (query designer routes through the shared tree)
ORelationController derives OJoinController (relation designer routes through the shared tree)

carve_out.note: This contract proves ONLY that the Add Table/Query hierarchical tree wires through the already-implemented generic net-less tree part. It makes NO claim about the surfaces below; each stays build-bound and/or design-bound (no chapter-12 wireframe spec exists for them yet), and none is advanced by this pin.
surfaces: Table Design field grid / field-properties pane
Query Design join-graph canvas (custom-painted connector lines via ConnectionLine.cxx, a different mechanism from the net-less tree)
Form Design toolbar / control-palette / property-browser workflow
